name: Euler's Totient Sieve
description: Compute Euler's totient φ(n) for all n from 1 to N using a linear sieve.
intuition: φ(n) counts integers in [1,n] coprime to n. Start with φ[i]=i, then for each prime p, reduce every multiple by factor (p-1)/p. Primes can be detected because their φ equals themselves minus 1.
